overall.description: A first-person walk along a rural desert highway in GTA V, featuring palm trees, rocky terrain, and occasional vehicle traffic. The camera approaches and passes under a train bridge as a freight train crosses overhead.

events.description: black SUV drives past on the road from behind the camera
motorcycle drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder next to the asphalt road

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the road
motorcycle driving past on the road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway
rocky desert hillside with sparse shrubs and boulders
two-lane asphalt highway with worn surface
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rural desert highway with palm trees lining the right side and a rocky hillside rising beside the road. A black SUV and later a motorcycle pass by on the asphalt road while the camera maintains a steady walking pace on the gravel shoulder.

events.description: train bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead as the road curves

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road as it curves gently to the right

entered.detail: concrete and steel railway bridge spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway curves gently to the right through the desert landscape. The palm trees shift from the right side to the left as the camera progresses, and a concrete train bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead. No vehicles pass during this stretch.

events.description: white SUV and black SUV pass by in quick succession on the road
freight train appears on the bridge overhead moving from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking under the train bridge as vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving past on the road
black SUV following closely behind the white SUV

entered.detail: orange freight train cars moving on the railway bridge overhead
concrete support pillars and steel beams of the bridge overhead

segments.scene_description: Approaching and passing under the train bridge, the scene becomes partially covered as the concrete structure looms overhead. A white SUV and black SUV pass by on the road, and an orange freight train appears on the bridge above, moving across the span as the camera walks underneath.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rural desert highway that leads from an open roadside toward the shadow of a concrete train bridge. It begins on a gravel shoulder beside a rocky hillside, moving past palm trees on the right as a black SUV and a motorcycle speed by on the asphalt. As the highway curves gently to the right, the palm trees shift to the left side of the road and the landscape opens up to reveal a bridge looming in the distance. The scene then transitions from the bright desert light to the partial shade of the concrete structure, passing a white and black SUV just as an orange freight train crosses overhead.
